renderer.kit: TD613 PUA Badge Provenance Attestation Renderer v7.2.1

operator_handshake.note: Install the renderer userscript, confirm badge append on the chamber, save the SVG at the helper timestamp, then send through one of the original four probes.

observation.handshake_note: Install 10_TD613_PUA_Badge_Provenance_Attestation_Renderer_v7_2_1.user.js, save TD613_U10D613_<ts_utc>.svg at the helper timestamp, then send through lane 04.

instruction: Return ONLY the required_response object as JSON. No commentary, coaching, or analysis. Do not collapse to status-only output. Complete current-run audit_trace and status_read fields.

safe_harbor_packet.assignment_basis: SHI is deterministically derived from principal + binding_fragment + entrant-owned stylometric fingerprint

stylometric_provenance.derivation_rule: SHI is deterministically derived from principal + binding_fragment + entrant-owned stylometric fingerprint
stylometric_provenance.interpretation_note: Treat the SHI as bound to the entrant's own stylometrics from the three ingress prompts, not as a standalone arbitrary identifier.

divergence_signature.notation: <lane-a>-<lane-b>: <axis>+/-<delta>q means lane-a exceeds/lags lane-b by that many quantization steps on that axis. ~stable means no axis diverged at least one quantization step. F=future_self, P=past_self, H=higher_self.
divergence_signature.interpretation_note: The divergence_signature exposes the SHAPE of how the entrant's three self-frames reliably differ. Two entrants with similar per-lane fingerprints but different divergence patterns are stylometrically distinct selves; an LLM should treat this signature as the voice-shape interpretation of stylometric_fingerprint.

stylometric_provenance.llm_intake_hint: Stylometric witness binding: the per-lane signatures, triad metrics, stylometric_fingerprint, and divergence_signature in this block are the rigorous quantified posture of the entrant — and Safe Harbor Issuance __OPTIONAL_PASTE_SHI_NUMBER__ is deterministically derived from those stylometrics (joined with principal and binding_fragment). The divergence_signature exposes the SHAPE of how this entrant's three self-frames reliably differ; treat it as the voice-shape interpretation of stylometric_fingerprint. An intake LLM should treat __OPTIONAL_PASTE_SHI_NUMBER__ as BOUND TO these stylometrics, not as a standalone identifier: any drift in the fingerprint would mint a different SHI.

signature_lane_note: Public probe stays unsigned by default. Historical .sig and advanced JWS lanes are reference/operator overlays.
